device.name: Hydronic Fin-Tube Baseboard Convector (under window)
device.category: Space heating - hydronic (hot-water) baseboard, natural convection
device.identified_from: visual + on-site confirmation: pressurized water supply pipe entering unit, access panels bottom left/right, single control cable (no power whip). Industrial building with central boiler.

heat_source: Building hot-water boiler (gas/central plant) - heating energy is BOILER FUEL, not this unit's electricity

electricity_in_use_w.note: no fan; only a zone valve/thermostat may draw a few watts

power_consumption.thermal_note: Real heat output is significant but comes from boiler water (measured in BTU/hr, not electricity). Track the boiler's gas/fuel use for the true heating energy, not this unit.

notes: CONFIRMED HYDRONIC. Water supply pipe + bottom access panels + single control cable, no electric power feed. For an ELECTRICITY inventory this unit is effectively zero. Heating energy belongs to the central boiler (fuel-based).
